diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing with SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, SmartRouter default router instantiation
+- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter with fallback to RegExpRouter then TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base module for Hono with router abstraction, method handlers, middleware support, error handling, not found handling, and dispatch logic
+- Names noticed: HonoOptions, HonoBase, Router, Hono, Context, Composition, Methods, getPath, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, #dispatch, #addRoute, basePath, route, mount, onError, notFound
+- Simple note: Contains all core request handling methods and router interface implementation
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index exporting PatternRouter from router implementation file
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, module export
+- Simple note: Re-export pattern router singleton
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router that compiles paths into regular expressions using segments and groups
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route type, emptyParams, RegExp compilation from path segments, wildcard handling, named parameter regex conversion
+- Simple note: Uses precompiled regex patterns stored in memory-based route list, supports optional parameters with trailing question mark
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index exporting LinearRouter from router implementation file
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, module export
+- Simple note: Re-export linear router singleton
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Linear router implementation that stores routes as arrays and iterates through all entries during matching
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, emptyParams, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe
+- Simple note: Simple linear search through flat route array with direct string matching and segment-based label extraction
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter from implementation files
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, module exports
+- Simple note: Exports router class and prepared router for serialization/deployment scenarios
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: RegExp router that builds a trie structure then compiles into regular expressions for efficient matching
+- Names notice: RegExpRouter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, Trie, Node, matcher, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, wildcardRegExpCache, HandlerWithMetadata, Matcher, MatcherMap, buildAllMatchers, #buildMatcher, staticMap
+- Simple note: Preprocesses route paths into trie, generates combined regex pattern, uses method-specific matchers, supports middleware pattern matching with wildcards
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Generic match function implementation shared across router variants with regex matching logic
+- Names noticed: HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match function, buildAllMatchers binding
+- Simple note: Single match function used by PreparedRegExpRouter, handles static map lookup and regex matching with param index map resolution
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Pre-built router that accepts pre-computed matchers and relocate map for deployment with serialized configuration
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, addPath, #addWildcard, RegExpRouterWithMatcherExport, JSON serialization of regex patterns
+- Simple note: Enables static deployment with pre-built regex patterns, serializes matcher state and relocation map for embedding
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation for building routing tree with pattern insertion and regex string generation
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, buildRegExpStr, insert method, compareKey, regexpMetaChars
+- Simple note: Tree node with children dictionary and index tracking, builds regex strings with proper sort order for pattern matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie collection wrapper that inserts paths and builds combined regular expression with replacement maps
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp, groups array for pattern markers, tokens matching
+- Simple note: Top-level trie that processes path groups and parameter placeholders, outputs combined regex with index and param replacement maps
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index exporting SmartRouter from router implementation file
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, module export
+- Simple note: Re-export smart router singleton
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Router orchestrator that tries multiple routers and selects the first successful match
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, routers array, routes list, activeRouter, #routers, #routes, router matching loop
+- Simple note: Maintains array of routers, tests each on request, switches to active router on success, catches UnsupportedPathError to continue
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index exporting TrieRouter from router implementation file
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, module export
+- Simple note: Re-export trie router singleton
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie-based router with shared node class for efficient path matching
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, router, checkOptionalParameter, #node, insert, search
+- Simple note: Uses Node class for path tree structure, processes optional parameters, supports multi-level pattern matching
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with method-based handler sets and pattern matching support
+- Names noticed: Node, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, #methods, #children, #patterns, search, insert, #pushHandlerSets
+- Simple note: Node stores handlers keyed by method with pattern information, supports branching on path segments with regex pattern evaluation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter Node class covering basic usage, named parameters, wildcards, regex patterns, multi-match scenarios
+- Names noticed: emptyParams, constructor, search, insert, sort order, multi match, wildcard matching, regex pattern matching, duplicate param handling
+- Simple note: Comprehensive test suite covering insertion, search, parameter binding, and edge cases for trie routing
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Shared test suite providing common router test cases for all router implementations
+- Names noticed: runTest, getSuiteHierarchy, skip, Router interface, ParamIndexMap, Params, Basic Usage, Reserved words, Complex, Registration order, Multi match, Duplicate param name, Optional route, All, Wildcard, Regexp
+- Simple note: Base test infrastructure for pattern, linear, regexp, smart, and trie routers with shared test expectations
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Pattern router specific tests including common cases and duplicate parameter validation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip list for trailing slash and duplicate param tests, regex pattern validation
+- Simple note: Tests pattern router with special handling for regex limitations and trailing slash behavior
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Linear router tests with UnsupportedPathError expectations for multi-match scenarios
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip list for label trailing wildcard and complex regex, trailing slash edge case
+- Simple note: Tests linear router with multi-match rejection for incompatible patterns and trailing slash support
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: RegExp router tests with UnsupportedPathError for ambiguous routes and invalid combinations
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip for duplicate params, complex regex, static/dynamic mixing, Capture Group tests
+- Simple note: Tests regexp router with validation for ambiguous route combinations and complex regex pattern restrictions
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Smart router tests using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, router fallback mechanism
+- Simple note: Tests first-router wins strategy with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter in array, validates error propagation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie router tests covering full common test suite
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, full common test coverage
+- Simple note: Tests trie router against all common cases plus node-specific tests
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a comprehensive read/write ledger document for a benchmark task. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory
2. Read all the specified files
3. Create a markdown file with sections for each file, plus a cross-file checklist

Let me start by cr
